characters.name: Al Connor
characters.description: Al ConnorBiographyGenderMaleOccupationFire Chief ofPawnee, IndianaSeries InformationFirst Appearance"The Camel"Portrayed byBarry SigismondiChief Al Connoris a guest character in thesecondseason of theNBCsitcomParks and Recreation. He isPawnee's longest-tenured department head, having taken over theFire Departmentat age twenty-nine, after everyone else quit due to lack of hoses. He is known for his easygoing manner and corny jokes, as well as for having that disease where you can't feel pain when exposed to extreme temperatures. So, "firefighter" was kind of a no-brainer, career choice-wise. For the Pawnee Mural contest, he and his team created a 'camel' of dogs playing poker with an 'everything on fire theme'. It also had some 'other things they liked' on it, including women. Their mural inspiredLeslieto use her own team's camel. His mural did not win the contest, nor did any of the others, as an older mural was restored.

characters.name: Allison Gliffert
characters.description: Allison GliffertBiographyAgeTeenagerGenderFemaleOccupationHigh School StudentResidencePawnee, IndianaFamilySignificant other(s)Greg Pikitis(boyfriend)Series InformationFirst Appearance"The Treaty"Last Appearance"Prom"Portrayed byKelly WashingtonAllison Gliffertis a recurring character in theNBCsitcomParks and Recreation. She is a high school student inPawnee. She has straight blonde hair and typically wears glasses. She is played byKelly Washington. InThe Treaty,BenandLeslieruin the model United Nations event that Allison is active in. However, she clearly says that her name is "Cassidy", making it seem as though this Season Four appearance may be Kelly Washington playing a character that is separate from the "Allison Gliffert" who appears in Season Six. The "Cassidy"-"Allison" discrepancy remains unclear, as the characters both act and dress similarly and do nothing which makes them definitively seem like different people. InProm, Allison works intimately with Leslie to plan her high school prom. Allison is shown to be very similar to Leslie, harboring the same binder-organization obsession. Leslie wants Allison to become an intern at the Parks department, but Ron does not want any young soul sucked into the putrid stinkhole of government. Leslie andRoncompete over guiding Allison's career. Leslie is horrified when she learns that Allison is datingGreg Pikitis. She instantly retracts the internship offer.

characters.name: April Ludgate
characters.description: April Ludgate-DwyerBiographyAliasesZuZuJanet SnakeholeApril Ludgate-Karate-DwyerJudy HitlerApril Ludgate-KevorkianApril Blart, Mall CopApril SwansonBuzz AldrinSatan's NieceCurrently Doing ThatMrs Burt MacklinOdie the Dog, Garfield’s NemesisGlenSatanBornApril 13, 1989Pawnee, IndianaAge36GenderFemaleStatusAliveOccupationStudent atPawnee Community College(lapsed)Intern at theParks and Recreation Department(lapsed)Assistant to thedirectorof theParks and Recreation Department(former)Assistant toPawnee'sCity Manager(temporary)Band manager ofMouse Rat(former)Assistant toBen Wyattduring a congressional campaignDeputy Director ofAnimal Controlin theParks and Recreation Department(former)Employee at American Service Foundation (currently)Executive Director, Regional Affairs at National Park Service Midwest RegionEthnicityHalf Puerto Rican, Half CaucasianResidenceWashington, D.C.Pawnee (former)FamilyRelative(s)Larry Ludgate(father)Rita Ludgate(mother)Natalie Ludgate(sister)Cousin named HestonSpouse(s)Andy DwyerSignificant other(s)Derek(ex-boyfriend)Eduardo(ex-boyfriend)ChildrenJack Dwyer(son)Unnamed child born sometime after 2025Series InformationSeasons1•2•3•4•5•6•7Episodes125First Appearance"Pilot"Last Appearance"A Parks and Recreation Special"Portrayed byAubrey PlazaApril Roberta Ludgate-Dwyer(néeLudgate) is a fictional character in theNBCcomedyParks and Recreation. She was an employee at thePawneeDepartment of Parks and Recreation, originally as an intern. Her alter egos includeJanet SnakeholeandJudy Hitler. She is portrayed byAubrey Plaza. Unnamed child born sometime after 2025 April Ludgate is a college student who starts out working as an intern in the Pawnee parks and recreation department. April is extremely uninterested in the job and acts very dryly and sarcastically around her co-workers.

characters.description: ArtieBiographyGenderMaleOccupationSecurity Guard atPawnee City HallResidencePawnee, IndianaSeries InformationAppearance"Time Capsule"Artieis a guest character in thethirdseason of theNBCsitcomParks and Recreation. He is a security guard atPawnee City HallwhoLeslie Knopecalls to remove protesterKelly Larson, who has handcuffed himself to a pipe in her office. Kelly tells her, "This muscle-headed Stormtrooper isn't going to scare me", but immediately begins to scream when Artie moves to cut him loose from the pipe.

characters.name: August Clementine
characters.description: August N'Gutu Liebowitz-ClementineBiographyAgeAdultGenderMaleOccupationRadio HostResidencePawnee, formerlyEagletonSeries InformationAppearanceAnniversariesPortrayed byJohn HodgmanAugust N’gutu Leibowitz-Clementineis a guest character in thesixthseason of theNBCsitcomParks and Recreation. He is a radio broadcaster from formerEagleton. Following the town merger, he became the co-host ofThoughts for Your ThoughtswithDerry Murbles. August is a middle-aged man with brown hair and a Van Dyke-style moustache and beard. He typically wears eyeglasses, and seems fond of bow ties and sweatervests. August Clementine is played byJohn Hodgman.

characters.name: Beverly
characters.description: BeverlyBiographyGenderFemaleResidencePawnee, IndianaSeries InformationSeasons2Episodes3First Appearance"Sister City"Last Appearance"Time Capsule"Portrayed byKaren TelihaBeverly, also credited as "Muriel" and "Weird Woman", is a recurring character in theNBCsitcomParks and Recreation. characters.name: Bill Dexhart
characters.description: Bill DexhartBiographyAge42GenderMaleOccupationCouncilmanFamilyChildrenMason, Carter, Phil Mason, Krystal, Tiffany, Jakie, Heather, unnamed love child with midwifeSeries InformationFirst Appearance"Practice Date"Last Appearance"Ron & Jammy"Portrayed byKevin SymonsWilliam "Bill" Dexhartis a recurring character in theNBCsitcomParks and Recreation. He is a local politician who, in the episodes in which he's appeared, has always been embroiled in a bizarre sex scandal involving multiple partners. Despite this, he always ends by saying he has no plans to resign. In the episode "Practice Date", a scandal breaks out involving Dexhart for having four-way sex in a Brazilian cave while pretending to be building houses for the underprivileged. He claims, in his defense, that it was his birthday and he "really wanted to do it". In the episode "Christmas Scandal", Dexhart claims that he's had an affair withLeslie Knopeafter meeting with her to discuss her performance in the Annual Pawnee Government Christmas Follies spoofing his recent sex scandals. She learns the sketch was accidentally accurate about another bizarre sex scandal that has not been made public. After assuring Dexhart that it was merely a coincidence, Leslie discovers that the local tabloid,The Pawnee Sun, has taken pictures of their lunch and is reporting that Leslie is Dexhart's new mistress. The local show "Pawnee Today" digs up an old video of Leslie shaking hands with Dexhart and overanalyzes every aspect of the short clip.Ann Perkinsbrings Dexhart to her home, where Ann and Leslie demand he clear Leslie's name. Dexhart refuses because the fake scandal is so docile compared to his real transgressions that it is actually positive press for him. He then tries getting Leslie to actually have sex with him, much to Ann and Leslie's shock. As he gets pushed out of the house he tries to push her saying: "people already think we did it" and "I'm very good" to no avail. Soon after, Ann is horrified to discover that a news crew secretly followed Dexhart to her home and took a photograph of the meeting, resulting in speculation that Ann is Leslie's lesbian lover in a three-way relationship with Dexhart. A furious Leslie schedules an appearance on "Pawnee Today" to clear her name once and for all. On the show, hostJoan Callamezzosurprises Leslie by bringing out Dexhart, who tries to prove their affair by claiming that Leslie has a mole on her buttocks. To finally end the scandal, Leslie pulls down her pants on live television and moons Callamezzo. Since there is no mole, Dexhart is forced to admit that he fabricated the sex scandal. In the episodeSecond Chunce, after Leslie loses her recall election, she's depressed about being forced out of the City Council. Leslie and Ben then see on the news that Dexhart is embroiled in another sex scandal which involved him sending salacious messages to other women and "Text-Mexting". Leslie sees this as an opportunity to run against Dexhart for his council seat. B

characters.name: Bill Haggerty
characters.description: Bill HaggertyBiographyGenderMaleOccupationHistorian from the Pawnee Historical SocietyResidencePawnee, IndianaSeries InformationFirst Appearance"94 Meetings"Last Appearance"William Henry Harrison"Bill Haggertyis a minor character in theNBCsitcomParks and Recreation. He works with thePawnee Historical Society. In "94 Meetings", Bill meets withLeslie Knope. Originally, he was supposed to meet withRon Swanson, but due to scheduling conflicts, he's meeting with Leslie 3 months after he scheduled the appointment. He tells her it's probably already too late to do anything about it, but former Miss PawneeJessica Wickshas been renovating theTurnbill Mansion, a historical building inPawneefor her husbandNick Newport, Sr.'s 85th birthday party. Leslie immediately jumps into action in order to stop Jessica from further renovating the mansion.

characters.name: Bjorn Lerpiss
characters.description: Bjorn LerpissBiographyGenderMaleStatusAliveOccupationWorks from homeAffiliate(s)Lerpiss familyEthnicityCaucasianResidencePawnee, IndianaFamilyRelative(s)Lalyssa Lerpis (second cousin)Morris LerpissDennis LerpissSeries InformationPortrayed byMike MitchellBjorn Lerpissis a recurring character in theNBCsitcomParks and Recreation. He is a member of the sprawling Lerpiss family inPawnee, Indiana, and a pleasant man who has a beard. He once encountered Andy Dwyer in a bathroom and asked him for a mint. Another time, he sat near Chris Traeger in a bar and said "Hi" to him. He wanted Lot 48 to be turned into a Paunch Burger. He joined the committee to recall Leslie Knope as Pawnee Councilwoman. He loves Paunch Burger. He is second cousin to Lalyssa Lerpiss, a waitress who once served Leslie, Tom, and Ann at Scully's Bar. His favorite song is "Working for the Weekend," by Loverboy.[1]

characters.name: Brandi Maxxxx
characters.description: Brandi MaxxxxBiographyGenderFemaleOccupationPornographic StarPawnee Councilwoman (future)ResidencePawnee, IndianaSeries InformationFirst Appearance"Jerry's Painting"Last Appearance"One Last Ride"Portrayed byMara MariniBrandi Maxxxxis a recurring character in theNBCsitcomParks and Recreation. She is a former, but well known, pornographic actress who has starred in over 200 films after being in the business for only one year. Pawnee Councilwoman (future) Similar to Leslie Knope, Brandi is upbeat, polite and friendly. However, due the negative stigma of her former career and her open sexuality, Leslie is not fond of her or being associated with her but avoids being rude to her if possible. Leslie was also uncomfortable with Brandi's proposition to star in a film together.

Pawnee Councilwoman (future) Similar to Leslie Knope, Brandi is upbeat, polite and friendly. However, due the negative stigma of her former career and her open sexuality, Leslie is not fond of her or being associated with her but avoids being rude to her if possible. Leslie was also uncomfortable with Brandi's proposition to star in a film together.

characters.name: Brett Hull
characters.description: Brett HullBiographyGenderMaleOccupationCo-Director of theAnimal ControlResidencePawnee, IndianaSeries InformationFirst Appearance2.18:"The Possum"Last Appearance7.09:"Pie-Mary"Portrayed byColton DunnBrett Hullis a recurring character in theNBCsitcomParks and Recreation. He works forPawneeAnimal Controlalong withHarris. Leslie describes them as "burnt-out morons".Pawnee: The Greatest Town in Americastates that Harris and Brett took over as Co-Directors after longtime directorEugene Dredgeretired last year, presumably to spend more time smoking marijuana. In "The Possum",Leslie Knopeis asked to assemble a task force to catchFairway Frank, a possum accused of bitingMayor Gunderson's dog. When she asks for the two best guys to join her and be part of her task force,Eugenetells her that would be Brett andHarris. Brett is confused as to how theParks and Recreation Departmentemployees know his name, even though he's wearing a nametag. In "April and Andy's Fancy Party", Brett and Harris are present atAndy DwyerandApril Ludgate's wedding. They attempt to release doves after April and Andy say their "I Do's", but the one that Harris throws into the air falls to the ground, dead.

characters.name: Burly
characters.description: BurlyBiographyAliasesPuppy Hating DanGenderMaleOccupationGuitaristResidencePawnee, IndianaSeries InformationFirst Appearance"Woman of the Year"Last Appearance"The Johnny Karate Super Awesome Musical Explosion Show"Portrayed byAndrew BurlinsonAndrew "Burly" Burlinsonis a recurring character in theNBCsitcomParks and Recreation. He is the guitar player in the bandMouse Rat. He is known as the shy one and is known for being a neat freak who flips out on his roommates. But just calling him "the shy one" doesn't really do Burly justice. Burly's more like a shy, anal-retentive neat freak who gets upset with his temporary roommates when they're just trying to live normally. Like, Burly gets mad when someone puts the Pop Tarts box in his underwear drawer. But, doesn't it make sense to put the two first things you grab in the morning -- a frosted strawberry Pop Tart and, on laundry day, a pair of your roommate's clean underwear -- in the same spot? Burly calls this "a gross invasion of privacy." Others call it "an inspired time-saver." Other than that, Burly's an okay guy and pretty solid guitar player. In "Woman of the Year", Burly is seen arguing with his roommateAndy Dwyer. He tells him "if you're not going to pay rent, can you at least clean up your dishes?" He also demands he stop his bag of smells experiment. Burly tells him he better "shape up or move out". Frustrated, Andy starts looking for another place to live and enlistsApril Ludgate's help.

characters.name: Burt Macklin
characters.description: Burt Tyrannosaurus MacklinBiographyGenderMaleOccupationF.B.I. Special AgentFriendly LifeguardNot a Friendly LifeguardFamilyRelative(s)Kip Hackman (Brother)Spouse(s)Janet Macklin SnakeholeSignificant other(s)Judy Hitler(Lover, enemy)Series InformationFirst Appearance"Greg Pikitis"Last Appearance"One Last Ride"Portrayed byAndy DwyerBurt Tyrannosaurus Macklinis the alter-ego ofAndy Dwyer. Andy goes into character as Burt when a situation requires the presence of law enforcement. He has a twin brother named Kip Hackman (although this may be an alter ego for Macklin himself). Andy is first shown in the character of Burt Macklin in "Greg Pikitis" while questioning local teenGreg Pikitison his vandalism of Mayor Percy's statue. Burt waltzes in, claiming to work for the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI). However, Greg is mean to Burt and makes him cry. In "Ron & Tammy: Part 2", Andy writes a fake email, signed 'Burt Macklin', to get April out of working for Chris.

characters.name: Carl Lorthner
characters.description: Carl LorthnerBiographyAliasesPark Ranger CarlGenderMaleStatusSingleOccupationPark RangerNationalityAmericanResidencePawnee, IndianaSeries InformationSeasons2Episodes1Appearance2.19:"Park Safety"Portrayed byAndy SambergCarl Lorthneris a guest character in thesecondseason of theNBCsitcomParks and Recreation. He is a member of Parks Security inPawnee, Indiana, notable for his constant loud voice. He was portrayed byAndy Samberg. AfterJerrytells the Parks department that he was mugged inRamsett Park,Lesliegets in contact with Carl so they can improve park safety.

characters.name: Champion
characters.description: ChampionBiographyAliasesThree Legged Wonder DogGenderMaleOccupationDogSeries InformationFirst Appearance"The Comeback Kid"Last Appearance"One Last Ride"Portrayed byLucyChampionis a recurring character in theNBCsitcomParks and Recreation. He is the three-legged dog thatApril LudgateandAndy Dwyeradopted from the Pawnee animal shelter. Chris Traegerbabysat him during April and Andy's honeymoon and, during this time, he managed to train the dog in German. Andy was at first jealous of Chris's bond with Champion but after seeing how much the dog helped his lonely mood, Andy invited Chris to spend as much time with Champion as he wanted. Ron Swansonholding Champion

characters.name: Chance Frenlm
characters.description: Chance FrenlmBiographyGenderMaleEthnicityCaucasianResidencePawnee, IndianaSeries InformationFirst Appearance"Sweetums"Last Appearance"Gryzzlbox"Portrayed byJeffrey MarkleChance Frenlmis a recurring character in thesecondseason of theNBCsitcomParks and Recreation. He is a background character who pops up at the Pawnee town meetings. He frequently tries to get the other citizens to join in a chant. He once tried to rally a group of people to chant that a woman's daughter was an idiot. Another time he tried to get a chant going to get his cat Turnip's ashes included in the time capsule. Another time he created a chant for people to eat ham and mayonnaise sandwiches. Chance is played byJeffrey Markle.
